steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The blank describes what makes the collectibles market difficult. The evidence: “Few economists would have predicted” the Beanie Babies price surge. The market is hard because future prices are unpredictable.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• "forecast": means to predict future trends, which matches the passage's point that prices are hard to anticipate. ✓
  • "exchange": means to trade; the passage says nothing about trading being difficult. ✗
  • "monitor": means to observe; observing prices is not what's described as difficult. ✗
  • "avoid": means to stay away from; the passage never suggests the market is hard to avoid. ✗
That matches the correct answer — A is correct.
